Fiber HTTP handler.description: HTTP handler fiber — signature required by serve:

Fiber instance (typed).description: Create typed fiber and get first yielded value

Fiber instance (void).description: Create void fiber and run one step

For over fiber.description: for loop over fiber (auto-calls .next, .close on break)

yield from (delegation).description: Delegate yielding to a sub-fiber (yield from)

For (collection).description: For loop over array, set or fiber

net.respond inline.description: yield net.respond with inline JSON literal

Auth token extract (Bearer).description: Extract Bearer token from Authorization header

Database connection (full).description: SQLite database connection with all options

db.sync (create table).description: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS from XCX table schema

db.has (table exists).description: Check if table exists in database (no yield)

db.fetch with where.description: SELECT with filter — compiles to SQL WHERE

db.push (bulk insert).description: INSERT all local table rows into SQL

body: yield ${1:app}.exec("${2:DELETE FROM table WHERE id = ?}", [${3:id}]) as ${4:res};
table: ${1:result} = yield ${2:app}.query(${3:table_name}, "${4:SELECT * FROM table WHERE col = ?}", [${5:val}]);
db.query (typed).description: Raw SQL with schema hint — returns XCX table

body: json: ${1:result} = yield ${2:app}.queryRaw("${3:SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM table}");
db.queryRaw.description: Raw SQL without schema — returns JSON array

body: json: ${1:row} = yield ${2:app}.queryRaw("${3:SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM table}").first();
db.queryRaw.first().description: queryRaw aggregate — get first row (halt.error if empty)

Table with @auto @pk (DB-ready).description: Table definition with @pk for database use

body: --- Declare first, assign separately (Windows S101 workaround)
Fiber-scoped db variable (Windows workar.description: Safe pattern for fiber-local DB variables on Windows

Table .where() HAS.description: Filter rows where string column contains substring

Table .join() (key-based).description: Inner join two tables on key columns

Table .join() (lambda).description: Inner join two tables with lambda predicate

Table .count().description: Get number of rows in table

Table .show().description: Print table in ASCII format to terminal

Table .toJson().description: Serialize table to JSON array of objects

Table get field.description: Get field value from table row

Table find index by field.description: Find row index by field value (returns -1 if not found)

JSON parse.description: Parse JSON string (panics on invalid JSON — R305)

JSON .bind().description: Extract JSON field into typed variable

JSON .exists().description: Check if JSON key exists before binding

JSON .push() to array node.description: Append item to a JSON array node (halt.error if node is object)

JSON array push via bracket notation.description: Set JSON array element via bracket notation

JSON .inject() to table.description: Bulk import JSON array into XCX table

JSON response builder.description: Build mutable JSON response and yield

JSON .first().description: First element of JSON array (halt.error if empty)

JSON nested bind (dot path).description: Bind nested JSON field using dot-notation path

Set .remove().description: Remove element from set (no-op if not present)

Set .contains().description: Check if element exists in set

For over set.description: Iterate over all elements in a set

random.choice.description: Pick random element from set or array

random.int.description: Random integer in range [min, max] (step=1 by default)

random.int (with @step).description: Random integer from stepped range (e.g. even numbers)

random.float.description: Random float in range [min, max] (step=0.5 by default)

Map .toJson().description: Serialize map to JSON object (keys converted to strings)

Map .keys() / .values().description: Get arrays of keys and values from map

String .replace().description: Replace all occurrences of a substring

String .slice().description: Substring from index start up to end (exclusive)

String .indexOf() / .lastIndexOf().description: Index of first/last occurrence (-1 if not found)

String .split().description: Split string by separator into array

String .toInt() / .toFloat().description: Parse string to int (halt.error if invalid)

halt.error.description: Error — stops current frame, caller continues

store.write.description: Write string to file (creates if missing)

store.list.description: List files and folders at path

store.isDir.description: Check if path is a directory

crypto.hash (base64 decode).description: Decode Base64 string back to data

date literal (custom format).description: Date from string with custom format

date difference (days).description: Number of days between two dates (integer result)

Rate limit key (date-based).description: Build per-minute rate limit key from IP + timestamp

env.get.description: Get environment variable (halt.error if not set)

env.args.description: Get CLI arguments passed to the program

env.args loop.description: Get and iterate over CLI arguments

input.key().description: Read key if available, empty string if not (normal mode)

input.key() @wait.description: Block until a key is pressed and return it

input.ready().description: true if a key is waiting in the buffer

.terminal !raw.description: Enable raw mode (no echo, no buffering) — required for input.key()

.terminal !move x y.description: Move cursor to position x, y (integers)

.terminal !run.description: Run another XCX file in a new process

Game loop (terminal).description: Full game loop with raw terminal and arrow key input

perf benchmark block.description: Benchmark block: capture start time, run code, print elapsed ms
